hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -5; TSC=$?; npm run build --no-lint 2>&1 | tail -10; BUILD=$?; if [ $TSC -ne 0 ] || [ $BUILD -ne 0 ]; then echo 'VALIDATION FAILED: TypeScript or build errors remain. Fix before stopping.' >&2; exit 2; fi; echo 'All checks passed.'; exit 0

allow: Bash(cd C:/Users/glygs/documents/ai-networking-coach && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 && cd extension && node build.mjs 2>&1)
